scripts.start:dev: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=development EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://10.0.2.2:8000/api EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_NAME="FormTinMal DEV" EXPO_PUBLIC_ENABLE_LOGS=true expo start --clear
scripts.start:staging: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=staging EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://staging-api.example.com/api EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_NAME="FormTinMal UAT" EXPO_PUBLIC_ENABLE_LOGS=true expo start --clear
scripts.start:prod: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=production EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.example.com/api EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_NAME="FormTinMal" EXPO_PUBLIC_ENABLE_LOGS=false expo start --clear
